headline: Geovany Quenda
body: 🚨🔵 Official: Geovany Quenda has now been announced as new signing by Chelsea. “I am excited to work with my team mates and the manager Xabi Alonso. I’m very hard working young person and I like to help my team”, Quenda says.
raw_text:
🚨🔵 Official: Geovany Quenda has now been announced as new signing by Chelsea.

“I am excited to work with my team mates and the manager Xabi Alonso. I’m very hard working young person and I like to help my team”, Quenda says.
text:
🚨🔵 Official: Geovany Quenda has now been announced as new signing by Chelsea.

“I am excited to work with my team mates and the manager Xabi Alonso. I’m very hard working young person and I like to help my team”, Quenda says.
draft_caption:
